text:
Once upon a time in a sleepy little forest, there lived a wise old owl named Olive. She knew everything. Well, sort of. Everyone knew her.

Each morning she’d glide out from her mossy home. Today’s theme? Breakfast.

She hunted worms.

She loved their squish.

Afterward she slurped up pitcher plants.

They were green!

Afterwards she'd eat some fungus.

It made her sleepy.

She liked that.

Then she’d sing.

She knew all the birds.

Birds?

Yes!

She’d say things like, “Sweep!”

They’d fly away.

Then she’d owl.


Days turned to moonlit nights.

She felt a little...

Oh.


She decided to go swimming.

In a crystal ball.

But it was slimy!

She floated slowly.

Then she saw.

A dragon!

It looked scared.

She told it nice stories.

Like how she’s nice.

It listened.

Maybe it wouldn feather.

Then it flew.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
